entities.title: Hardware Entities & General
entities.description: Select pool hardware entities and configure general settings.

data.test_mode: Test mode (dry-run, do not write hardware)

data_description.pump_switch_entity: Main ON/OFF control for the pool circulation pump.
data_description.pump_mode_select_entity: Mode selector on your pool controller (Manual / Auto / Heat).
data_description.pump_speed_select_entity: Speed selector used to set Slow / Medium / High pump speed.
data_description.pump_running_sensor_entity: Use this if your hardware exposes an actual running status. Improves runtime tracking accuracy.
data_description.outdoor_temp_sensor_entity: Outside temperature used for freeze and winter protection decisions.
data_description.outdoor_temp_fallback_sensor_entity: Used if the primary outdoor sensor becomes unavailable.
data_description.pool_temp_sensor_entity: Pool water temperature sensor used for logic and visibility.
data_description.solar_excess_sensor_entity: Binary or numeric sensor indicating solar excess power. When active in summer, the pump switches to heat mode.
data_description.backwash_sensor_entity: Binary sensor that suspends all pump control during backwash.
data_description.update_interval_minutes: How often the integration evaluates logic and applies changes.
data_description.test_mode: When enabled, changes are only logged and not written to pool hardware entities.
data_description.notify_service: Optional HA notify service (for example notify.mobile_app_phone).

winter.title: Winter Mode
winter.description: Configure winter time slots, freeze protection and filtration speed.

data_description.slot1_start_entity: Entity that sets start time of filter slot 1.
data_description.slot1_end_entity: Entity that sets end time of filter slot 1.
data_description.slot2_start_entity: Entity that sets start time of filter slot 2.
data_description.slot2_end_entity: Entity that sets end time of filter slot 2.
data_description.slot3_start_entity: Entity that sets start time of filter slot 3.
data_description.slot3_end_entity: Entity that sets end time of filter slot 3.
data_description.slot1_speed_select_entity: Select entity controlling speed for slot 1.
data_description.slot2_speed_select_entity: Select entity controlling speed for slot 2.
data_description.slot3_speed_select_entity: Select entity controlling speed for slot 3.
data_description.winter_min_runtime_minutes: Minimum total pump runtime to achieve each winter day.
data_description.winter_filtration_speed_level: Pump speed used for all three winter filtration slots.
data_description.freeze_temp_c: If outdoor temperature falls below this value, run pump continuously on Slow speed.
data_description.extreme_freeze_temp_c: If outdoor temperature falls below this value, run pump continuously on Medium speed.

summer.title: Summer Mode
summer.description: Configure volume-based summer filtration and solar heat settings.

data.summer_pump_flow_m3h: Pump flow rate at High speed / max (m³/h)

data_description.summer_pool_volume_m3: Total pool water volume. Used to calculate the daily filtration target.
data_description.summer_pump_flow_m3h: Maximum pump flow rate at High speed. Medium and Low speeds are derived from this using the factors below.
data_description.pump_flow_factor_medium: Flow rate at Medium speed as a percentage of the High-speed max. Default 50%.
data_description.pump_flow_factor_low: Flow rate at Low / Heat speed as a percentage of the High-speed max. Default 25%.
data_description.summer_cover_reduction_pct: Reduces the daily volume target when the pool cover is used.
data_description.summer_bather_load_factor: Multiplier applied to the daily volume target based on bather activity.
data_description.summer_min_runtime_minutes: The pump will always run at least this long per day, even if the volume target is met early.
data_description.summer_max_runtime_minutes: Hard daily cap. Pump stops unconditionally when this is reached.
data_description.summer_heat_target_temp_c: Pool water temperature above which solar heating stops.
data_description.summer_heat_hysteresis_c: Temperature must drop this far below the target before heating restarts.
data_description.volume_hysteresis_m3: Volume must rise this much above target before filtration pauses.
data_description.summer_mandatory_window_1_start: Pump always runs during this window (up to max runtime). Leave blank to disable.
data_description.summer_mandatory_window_2_start: Pump always runs during this window (up to max runtime). Leave blank to disable.
data_description.summer_day_start_hour: Filtration will not pre-run before this hour. After this hour the pump runs freely for the rest of the day (and evening) until the volume target is met.
data_description.summer_day_end_hour: Informational end of the preferred daytime window (not a hard stop). Pump continues past this hour if the volume target is not yet met.

recalculate_now.name: Recalculate now
recalculate_now.description: Force next tick to rebuild slot schedule.
